label: Book with one author
heading: Example: book with one author
body:
In-text citations

The overview by McCormick (2023) confirms Hill’s experience (2023, pp. 46–52).

NB: No page number citation for McCormick because the reference is to the whole book.

Specific pages are being cited in Hill’s book.

Reference list

Hill, F. (2023) There’s nothing for you here: finding opportunity in the twenty-first century. Mariner Books.

McCormick, J.M. (2023) American foreign policy and process. 7th edn. Cambridge University Press.
youTry: Surname, Initial. (Year of publication) Title. Edition. Publisher.
